Offers & seasonal rates

Special offers

A handful of ways to make the bush go further — stay-longer rates, green-season value and the occasional last-minute suite. Every offer is booked direct, with zero added fees.

Stay 4, pay 33 suites left

The long-rains escape

Four nights for the price of three through the green season, when the bush is at its most dramatic and the newborns arrive.

R37,500R50,000Save 25%
Book this offer
HoneymoonBy request

Just married

A complimentary night, a private bush dinner and a sparkling welcome when you stay four nights or more in any suite.

R48,000R58,500+1 free night
Book this offer
Last minute2 dates left

Within-30-days rate

Plans came together late? Take 20% off any suite for arrivals inside the next month, subject to availability.

R10,000R12,500Save 20% · pp / night
Book this offer
Exclusive useWhole lodge

Take the whole lodge

Reserve all eight suites for five nights and the seventh and eighth nights are on us — Sabela, entirely yours.

R560,000R700,000Save 20%

FamilySchool holidays

Family villa, free child

One child under 12 stays and dines free in the Family Villa, with a private guide and vehicle throughout.

R33,000R44,0001 child free

PhotographersApr & Sep only

Photographic safari

A dedicated vehicle with bean bags and a specialist guide, plus an extra golden-hour drive each day.

R15,500R18,000+ private vehicle

Our best rates rarely last a week. Tell us your dates and we'll let you know the moment something opens.
